meaning: 云南(位于中国西南部);n.云南(中国西南部之一省)
examples: Miss Zhang seems quite familiar with Yunnan Province.
Ren wanted to make more money for himself in Yunnan.
Girls didn't want to go to school in Lijiang, Yunnan.
But in the days that followed, we ventured beyond the modern city, into Yunnan Province.
In particular, Yunnan Baiyao, a high-performing pharmaceutical maker, is on the cusp of Fab 50 consideration.
